expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Game card titles on the right side of both carousels are abruptly cut off mid-word (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...'). These truncations are jarring and make game names unreadable.
The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is cut off at the right edge, hiding the full label ('Hot Games' presumably). Users cannot read the full category name.

The right-edge game thumbnails in the 'Top Played New Games' section (e.g., 'Hypero...' and 'Dark Wate...') are cut off with no visual affordance like a scroll indicator or arrow to inform users they can scroll horizontally.

The bottom navigation bar 'Casino' item uses a different visual style (underlined text, colored icon) compared to other nav items, but this active-state differentiation is subtle and inconsistent with the other icon styles.

The promotional banner 'BET IT ON BLACK AND GOLD!' references Pittsburgh Penguins branding (black and gold), but the context may be confusing to users who don't associate it with a sports promotion versus a casino game.

expected.reasoning: Issue 3 directly describes the Casino icon in the bottom navigation bar having inconsistent visual styling compared to other nav items.
